title: Oriented Birds scoop Woza Woza title
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Oriented Birds Football Club were officially crowned champions of the Woza Woza Tournament Season 4 on Sunday 31 August, after defeating Potso Stars (Hankey) 2 0 in a tightly contested final at Kwanokuthula Stadium in Plettenberg Bay.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Oriented Birds Football Club were officially crowned champions of the Woza Woza Tournament Season 4 on Sunday 31 August, after defeating Potso Stars (Hankey) 2 0 in a tightly contested final at Kwanokuthula Stadium in Plettenberg Bay."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"As reward for their victory, Oriented Birds raked in R45 000."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Played under heavy clouds, the game delivered a thrilling spectacle for hundreds of local supporters who packed the stands.","html":"Played under heavy clouds, the game delivered a thrilling spectacle for hundreds of local supporters who packed the stands."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The victory marks a historic back-to-back championship for the Plett-based side, who have now firmly established themselves as one of the tournament's elite contenders.","html":"The victory marks a historic back-to-back championship for the Plett-based side, who have now firmly established themselves as one of the tournament's elite contenders."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Oriented Birds got off to a strong start after a cagey opening. Former SuperSport United player Sibusiso Maziko delivered a pinpoint cross into the box, where Eston Matheus rose highest to head home the opening goal past the Potso Stars goalkeeper.","html":"Oriented Birds got off to a strong start after a cagey opening. Former SuperSport United player Sibusiso Maziko delivered a pinpoint cross into the box, where Eston Matheus rose highest to head home the opening goal past the Potso Stars goalkeeper."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The home side took a 1-0 lead into the break, despite spirited efforts from Potso Stars duo Golimpi Lwando and Siyahluma Dyasi to find an equaliser.","html":"The home side took a 1-0 lead into the break, despite spirited efforts from Potso Stars duo Golimpi Lwando and Siyahluma Dyasi to find an equaliser."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The second half saw a more composed performance from the Birds, with midfielders Buyelekhaya Velelwandle and Athenkosi Dlala controlling the tempo.","html":"The second half saw a more composed performance from the Birds, with midfielders Buyelekhaya Velelwandle and Athenkosi Dlala controlling the tempo."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Supported by the experienced Melisizwe Duda, the hosts kept the Stars on the back foot.","html":"Supported by the experienced Melisizwe Duda, the hosts kept the Stars on the back foot."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Late in the match, a reckless challenge inside the box on Lakhiwe Menze earned Oriented Birds a penalty. Maziko calmly slotted it home to double the lead and put the result beyond doubt.","html":"Late in the match, a reckless challenge inside the box on Lakhiwe Menze earned Oriented Birds a penalty. Maziko calmly slotted it home to double the lead and put the result beyond doubt."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Goalkeeper Sesethu Nyunya was instrumental in maintaining the clean sheet, pulling off a string of crucial saves to deny Potso Stars a lifeline."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Lakhiwe Menze (left) of Oriented Birds fights for the ball with Walters Jeremierer (right) of Potso Stars. Photos: Zama Gagu","html":"Lakhiwe Menze (left) of Oriented Birds fights for the ball with Walters Jeremierer (right) of Potso Stars. Photos: Zama Gagu"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the semi-finals, Oriented Birds edged out Abahlobo FC (Knysna) 2-1, while Potso Stars advanced with a 2-0 win over Wits FC. A total of 32 teams competed in this year's edition of the annual tournament.","html":"In the semi-finals, Oriented Birds edged out Abahlobo FC (Knysna) 2-1, while Potso Stars advanced with a 2-0 win over Wits FC. A total of 32 teams competed in this year's edition of the annual tournament."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Head coach Welcome Qalanto praised his squad's determination, calling the victory a \"major boost\" for the team's development. \"We're in a building phase with a lot of new faces, and to win it again shows the strength and unity in the squad,\" said Qalanto.","html":"Head coach Welcome Qalanto praised his squad's determination, calling the victory a \"major boost\" for the team's development. \"We're in a building phase with a lot of new faces, and to win it again shows the strength and unity in the squad,\" said Qalanto."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
